title: dag-summary command + dag-summary.md artifact + non-interactive JSON path
definition_of_done: dag-summary command registered; non-interactive outputs JSON pending items; interactive runs TUI, emits dag-transition ops, writes dag-summary.md; go build passes
outcome: dag-summary command registered; non-interactive JSON path; interactive TUI with dag-transition ops and dag-summary.md artifact; go build passes

notes.msg: Implemented dag-summary command in cmd/trellis/dagsum.go: registers dag-summary cobra command, non-interactive path outputs JSON of pending items, interactive path runs TUI via dagsum.New/tea.NewProgram, emits dag-transition ops via appendLowStakesOp, writes dag-summary.md artifact. Registered in main.go. go build passes and --help shows command.
